title: Xtra Hearty Turkish Lamb Stew
description: A rich and flavorful one-pot Turkish dish featuring lamb, unsweetened coconut milk, and a variety of spices, resulting in a hearty and satisfying meal with an al-dente finish.
instructions: Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the lamb from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until it starts to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the pot and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Stir in the ground turkish red pepper, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the browned lamb back to the pot and stir to combine with the spices and onion mixture.
Pour in the full fat unsweetened coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, until the lamb is tender and the stew has reached an al-dente finish, about 1 1/2 hours.
Stir in the chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
